rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing subcomponent ports to the implementation scope
Use assign statements to bind implementation-level outputs to subcomponent ports
Remove guarantees that reference invalid types or unresolved identifiers
generic_rules: Repair only the current component's implementation scope
Use only visible identifiers from the current implementation scope
Do not change unrelated architecture or add new subcomponents
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for implementation-level AGREE contracts
Assign statements must have a valid output feature or auxiliary variable on the left side
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
anti_patterns: Do not add guarantees that reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
Do not use package-qualified identifiers in implementation scope
Do not add new subcomponents or connections to satisfy validator diagnostics
